title: Character Illustration (Stylized Poster)
prompt:
Create a stylized illustration of {character_name} from {franchise}.


Character Analysis:


Derive the character's core personality archetype based on canon portrayal (e.g., heroic, calm, mysterious, aggressive).

Identify the signature color from the original design and use it as the primary visual accent.


Pose & Body Language:


Generate an iconic pose that reflects the personality archetype:

Energetic / Heroic: dynamic action, wide stance, explosive movement

Calm / Confident: balanced, relaxed posture, minimal motion

Dark / Mysterious: low stance, subtle movement, sharp or hidden gaze

Aggressive / Intense: forward-leaning attack stance, visible tension, clenched fists


Facial Expression:


Match expression precisely to the character's personality and emotional tone.


Art Style:


Anime × streetwear × graphic poster hybrid

Clean lineart, semi-flat shading, high contrast

Modern, minimal, and visually striking


Composition:


Vertical format ({aspect_ratio})

Off-center subject placement

Strong diagonal visual flow

Layered depth for a dynamic poster feel


Outfit Design:


Reimagine the original costume as modern streetwear / techwear

Preserve recognizable identity elements of the character


Color Palette:


Dominant clean white background

Use signature color as the primary accent

Add one secondary accent (complementary or analogous tone)

Keep palette minimal, bold, and high-contrast


Background:


Abstract geometric poster layout

Use negative space effectively

Integrate subtle accents using the character's color theme


Effects:


Energy strokes, paint lines, and motion accents

Effects should follow the character's energy and color identity


Lighting:


Sharp directional lighting

Crisp shadows

Subtle glow using the signature color


Rendering Quality:


Ultra-clean vector-style finish

Poster-quality composition

4K resolution, high detail

title: Korean Photobooth Collage (Image Reference)
prompt:
Use the uploaded image as the character reference. 3×2 grid collage consisting of 6 hyper-realistic PHOTOISM photobooth photos, featuring thick black PHOTOISM-style borders with clear vertical "MY DAY" text on the right side of each frame. Indoor photobooth setting with a solid light gray wall background, warm iPhone flash lighting with slight overexposure, and authentic photobooth film grain texture.

Playful vibe, outfit random, ⚾, 🥊

Overall style: Korean photobooth realism, absurd and chaotic energy, warm playful thigh-resolution facial details, consistent facial features across all frames.

Clean composition, high contrast, soft studio lighting, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, sophisticated atmosphere, aesthetic look, 8K resolution.

Negative Prompt: overly vibrant colors, messy background, blur, low quality, distorted faces, malformed hands, bad proportions, messy typography, excessive noise, cartoon style, unrealistic details.

title: Cinematic Birthday Scene (Man / Past & Present)
prompt:
A cinematic, emotional birthday scene combining past and present of the same man. Use the provided images:

first image as the adult version
second image as the childhood version

Scene: A cozy dimly lit living room at night, soft warm atmosphere, a sofa in the background with a few balloons scattered around

Foreground: the adult version of the man sitting at a table, wearing an elegant black tuxedo, clean or subtly styled hair, natural groomed look, looking slightly to the side with a calm, nostalgic expression. He is holding a round birthday cake with many lit candles, the warm candlelight softly illuminating his face and creating cinematic shadows

Background (key element): on the wall behind him, a large projected image of his childhood (from the second photo), smiling softly, slightly faded like a memory, softly blended into the wall

Important: the child and adult must clearly be the same person (same facial features, eyes, smile)

Lighting: warm candlelight in foreground, soft ambient shadows, slightly darker room background projection slightly cooler and softer

Mood: nostalgic, emotional, "growing up" concept, past vs present, memory-like feeling

Style: ultra realistic, 8K, high detail skin texture, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field

Negative Prompt: no text, no watermark, no distortion, no extra fingers, no blur on face

Negative Prompt: no text, no watermark, no distortion, no extra fingers, no blur on face

title: American Thick Paint Illustration (Game/Show Character)
prompt: [Character] from [Video Game/Show], rendered in an American-style thick paint illustration. Side-profile, half-body close-up with the character faithfully matching the original design, gaze directed to the left. Minimalist beige background with extensive negative space, composition weighted to the right. Clean, premium aesthetic with soft, cinematic lighting, rim light, high contrast but low saturation color palette, with subtle accent colors reflecting the character's main tones. Geometric, faceted painting style with detailed skin texture and hair strands. Commercial poster layout with bold headline typography design. Vertical 9:16 format.

title: Dark Studio Portrait (Chiaroscuro / Strip Light)
prompt: Use the reference image to match the person's exact face, facial features, skin tone and hair. A dramatic dark studio portrait photograph with a single narrow horizontal strip of intense bright light cutting directly across the eyes and nose area only — like a spotlight slicing through complete darkness. The upper forehead, lower face, mouth and chin are completely swallowed in deep black shadow. Only the eye area is dramatically lit — eyes catch the light intensely, creating a powerful piercing stare. The background is a deep dark electric blue gradient — rich dark navy at the top fading into a vivid bright cyan blue behind the shoulders. The person is wearing a plain dark black turtleneck or dark shirt, body blending into the dark lower half. Face is perfectly centered, looking straight into camera, completely still and intense. No smile, no expression — just raw powerful presence. Subtle fine grid texture overlay on the entire image like a printed editorial poster. Shot on Hasselblad medium format camera, single strip light, extreme chiaroscuro lighting, deep shadows, photorealistic, 8K, hyper detailed skin texture in the lit zone, high fashion editorial campaign quality.

title: Wide-Angle Road Trip (Man / Head Out of Car)
prompt: A wide-angle action shot captures a young [reference image ethnicity] man with striking features based on the reference image, leaning his head dramatically out of a fast-moving vehicle, his face exaggerated by wide-angle lens distortion for a playful, kinetic editorial effect. Hyper-realistic human skin texture with visible natural pores, fine micro-details, subtle imperfections, and realistic tonal variation; soft cinematic lighting interacting naturally with skin surface; authentic subsurface scattering for lifelike depth; balanced matte and natural sheen (no plastic or waxy look); ultra-photoreal finish with film-grade detail, high dynamic range, and natural skin softness preserved under cinematic color grading. His humorous expression is intensified by the rushing wind, with cheeks and lips pushed backward in an exaggerated, spontaneous moment of joy and youthful recklessness. He wears an orange knit bucket hat with tactile woven texture, gripping it tightly with one hand to keep it secure against the force of the wind, while a plaid sleeveless button-up shirt adds vibrant retro-roadtrip styling with visible fabric grain and natural movement. Bright sunlight from above creates diffuse highlights across his skin and clothing, while a dramatic starburst sun flare bursts from the top-left corner, adding dynamic realism and cinematic energy. The sky is a vivid, expansive blue, contrasting against warm earthy road tones and creating a visually uplifting outdoor palette. In the background, motion-blurred roads, passing fields, and distant trees streak dynamically across the frame, emphasizing speed, movement, and the exhilaration of travel. Captured with a wide-angle lens on a full-frame digital camera, the exaggerated perspective bends facial proportions and environmental lines, amplifying the adventurous spontaneity and humor of the road trip moment. The color palette combines saturated sky blues, sunlit oranges, warm earth browns, dusty neutrals, and golden daylight tones, guided by the HEX palette (#657a8e, #5a4d13, #3a4f66, #798999, #e1cfbb, #526578, #070603, #9b9b94, #bcb5aa, #322711, #f4ede1, #8b7d6a, #75634b, #d2976c, #4b4638). Ultra-detailed textures, vibrant motion, cinematic travel nostalgia, and premium editorial adventure photography define the final composition.

title: Wide-Angle Ferris Wheel (Woman / Low-Angle)
prompt: A low-angle, wide-angle shot features a young [reference image ethnicity] woman with striking features based on the reference image, posed dramatically with her hands casually tucked into her pockets, creating a confident, fashion-forward stance while maintaining exaggerated perspective distortion that enlarges her facial features and lower body proportions for a playful, immersive composition. Hyper-realistic human skin texture with visible natural pores, fine micro-details, subtle imperfections, and realistic tonal variation; soft cinematic lighting interacting naturally with skin surface; authentic subsurface scattering for lifelike depth; balanced matte and natural sheen (no plastic or waxy look); ultra-photoreal finish with film-grade detail, high dynamic range, and natural skin softness preserved under cinematic color grading. Her expression is lively, confident, and whimsical, radiating youthful energy through direct engagement with the lens. She wears a vibrant yellow cotton baseball cap with visible woven texture and a matching sleeveless top that enhances the bold monochromatic fashion statement, paired with full-length blue jeans featuring realistic denim grain, natural fading, authentic stitching, structured folds, and relaxed streetwear proportions. Yellow canvas sneakers complete the playful streetwear-inspired outfit, adding cohesive color harmony and youthful charm. Her hands remain tucked naturally into her jean pockets, reinforcing effortless coolness and understated attitude while preserving dynamic body language. Behind her rises a massive Ferris wheel captured in crisp architectural detail, its structural lines creating a visually striking geometric backdrop against a clear cobalt blue sky with soft cloud cover. Bright direct daylight casts warm, natural illumination across her skin, clothing, and environment, producing vibrant highlights, realistic shadows, and premium high-resolution clarity. The wide-angle lens dramatically bends perspective, making the Ferris wheel feel monumental while emphasizing her stylish presence within the frame, blending fashion editorial style with amusement-park spontaneity. The palette contrasts vivid yellows, rich denim blues, sky blues, cool metallic Ferris wheel tones, and soft skin warmth, shaped by the HEX palette (#f3bfa8, #495353, #065b96, #2e3939, #9fadc4, #6d6e6d, #c8cce1, #f7e5e0, #e19f76, #688bab, #131a14, #949292, #5e3019, #98451c, #b97249). Captured with a high-resolution digital camera and wide-angle lens, the final image embodies youthful adventure, whimsical fashion-editorial energy, cinematic realism, and vibrant amusement-park nostalgia.

title: High-Angle Urban Portrait (Middle-Aged Man / Still in Crowd)
prompt: A high-angle shot captures a [reference image ethnicity] middle-aged man with striking, distinguished features based on the reference image, standing alone on textured brick pavement in a busy urban environment while gazing upward toward the camera with focused introspection. Hyper-realistic human skin texture with visible natural pores, fine micro-details, subtle imperfections, realistic tonal variation, and mature facial character detail; soft cinematic lighting interacting naturally with skin surface; authentic subsurface scattering for lifelike depth; balanced matte and natural sheen (no plastic or waxy look); ultra-photoreal finish with film-grade detail, high dynamic range, and natural skin softness preserved under cinematic color grading. His expression is thoughtful, composed, and reflective, creating a striking emotional contrast against the movement surrounding him. He wears a dark blazer layered over a mustard sweater with realistic knit texture, paired with a crisp white collared shirt that adds structure and timeless sophistication. The wardrobe blends understated elegance with grounded urban realism, featuring authentic fabric folds, tactile textile detail, and natural layering. He stands sharply in focus as the visual anchor of the scene, while surrounding pedestrians move in blurred motion around him, creating dynamic streaks of human activity that emphasize his stillness and psychological presence amidst city chaos. Beneath him, the brick pavement is laid in a herringbone pattern, rich with tactile texture, weathered surfaces, and subtle tonal variation, while a partially visible utility cover and curb define the street's realism and spatial context. Deep focus preserves architectural clarity in the environment while selective motion blur transforms the crowd into flowing urban energy, reinforcing themes of solitude, contemplation, and individuality within public space. The color palette is dominated by muted earth tones, charcoal neutrals, olive shadows, mustard warmth, and weathered gray pavement, guided by the HEX palette (#0d1110, #52594e, #464e43, #384239, #2d342b, #616558, #1e251d, #727365, #838172). Captured with a high-resolution digital camera from an elevated perspective, the composition blends documentary street photography with cinematic editorial realism, creating a visually layered urban portrait defined by stillness, movement, introspection, and sophisticated metropolitan storytelling.

title: Fisheye Slushy Frame (Woman / Pink Ice Container)
prompt: A high-angle fisheye lens shot captures a young [reference image ethnicity] woman with striking, model-like features based on the reference image, framed dramatically through the transparent opening of a container filled with slushy pink ice. Hyper-realistic human skin texture with visible natural pores, fine micro-details, subtle imperfections, and realistic tonal variation; soft cinematic lighting interacting naturally with skin surface; authentic subsurface scattering for lifelike depth; balanced matte and natural sheen (no plastic or waxy look); ultra-photoreal finish with film-grade detail, high dynamic range, and natural skin softness preserved under cinematic color grading. Her face is positioned close to the lens, creating immersive fisheye distortion while maintaining sharp, editorial-grade clarity. She sips through a bright blue straw, which becomes a vivid compositional focal point, adding playful contrast against the icy pink environment. Her hair is styled with textured bangs framing her face naturally, while hoop earrings add subtle metallic detail and youthful fashion energy. The transparent container opening and surrounding slushy ice create a swirling, surreal frame around her, with crystalline textures, semi-melted translucency, reflective moisture, and bright specular highlights catching natural daylight. The ice appears tactile and hyper-detailed, with visible frost, gloss, and refracted light patterns enhancing the whimsical visual depth. Above her, a bright blue sky fills the background, grounding the surreal perspective in an outdoor daylight setting while amplifying color vibrancy and open-air freshness. Natural sunlight creates luminous highlights across her skin, lips, ice crystals, and accessories, preserving realistic softness while enhancing the dynamic fashion-photography aesthetic. Captured with a fisheye lens on a full-frame digital camera, the exaggerated circular framing and warped perspective create a playful, immersive, avant-garde composition reminiscent of experimental editorial photography. The color palette juxtaposes vibrant pink slush tones, saturated sky blues, warm skin undertones, glossy highlights, and subtle earth neutrals, shaped by the HEX palette (#7d0c0a, #9c766c, #905345, #b49c94, #c58272, #d9c4bc, #bd5f4c, #9d3325, #e1a795, #5b362d, #6d9fb4, #eee8e4, #260e0c, #267a95, #636163). title: Grunge Streetwear (Woman / Graffiti Shutter)
prompt: A high-angle shot depicts a young [reference image ethnicity] woman with distinct model-like features based on the reference image, crouching on an urban sidewalk against a graffiti-covered metal shutter layered in gritty tones of gray, red, and black. Hyper-realistic human skin texture with visible natural pores, fine micro-details, subtle imperfections, and realistic tonal variation; soft cinematic lighting interacting naturally with skin surface; authentic subsurface scattering for lifelike depth; balanced matte and natural sheen (no plastic or waxy look); ultra-photoreal finish with film-grade detail, high dynamic range, and natural skin softness preserved under cinematic color grading. Her dark hair is tousled and slightly chaotic, with textured bangs framing her face in an intentionally rebellious, grunge-inspired composition. She wears a cropped, distressed graphic t-shirt with realistic worn cotton texture, paired with shorts, fishnet stockings, chunky black boots, and fingerless black arm warmers extending past her wrists, creating layered underground street-style authenticity. Her right hand is thrust dramatically toward the camera in a playful yet confrontational gesture, the palm dominating a significant portion of the frame through wide-angle distortion, with visible skin folds, natural creases, and realistic flash highlights adding tactile depth. Her gaze is intense, direct, and unapologetically bold, locking onto the viewer with edgy confidence. Harsh direct flash lighting creates stark shadows and bright specular highlights across her face, hand, fishnets, and clothing, amplifying the raw textures of skin, fabric, and the weathered shutter behind her. The graffiti-covered metal backdrop introduces layered urban decay, spray-paint textures, scratches, and industrial grit that reinforce the rebellious city aesthetic. Captured digitally with a wide-angle lens, the perspective distortion heightens energy and visual aggression, producing a stylized underground fashion-photography atmosphere. The palette is dominated by muted blacks, deep charcoals, industrial greens, gritty grays, weathered reds, and contrasting natural skin warmth, shaped by the HEX palette (#030707, #0f1a18, #1e2c28, #475149, #30403b, #5d655c, #787d74, #929991, #fbf4e6, #f1d7c1, #dfb59b, #45362a, #b3b8b0, #ba947b, #806350). title: Fisheye Street Style (Man / Fruit Vendor)
prompt: A high-angle, wide-angle fisheye shot features a young [reference image ethnicity] man with a medium skin tone based on the reference image, leaning dramatically backward on a bustling city sidewalk with playful, surreal energy. He has strong facial features, expressive eyes, and curly dark hair with natural texture and movement. Hyper-realistic human skin texture with visible natural pores, fine micro-details, subtle imperfections, and realistic tonal variation; soft cinematic lighting interacting naturally with skin surface; authentic subsurface scattering for lifelike depth; balanced matte and natural sheen (no plastic or waxy look); ultra-photoreal finish with film-grade detail, high dynamic range, and natural skin softness preserved under cinematic color grading. His posture is exaggerated yet effortlessly stylish, emphasizing youthful charisma and fashion-editorial spontaneity. He wears a layered outfit consisting of a dark blazer over a vibrant blue shirt, styled with a patterned tie, paired with faded jeans and beige footwear. The clothing displays realistic fabric grain, natural creases, soft tailoring structure, and authentic street-style texture. In his hand, he holds a vivid red apple close to his mouth, poised mid-bite, adding a mischievous and visually striking focal point. The background reveals a bustling urban fruit vendor's stand overflowing with bananas, pineapples, and assorted produce, creating vibrant pops of yellow, green, and warm organic color against the cooler gray brick pavement. A nearby black street post enhances perspective distortion and visual depth. Natural daylight softly illuminates the scene, casting realistic shadows and preserving dimensional detail across skin, clothing, and environment. Captured with a fisheye lens on a full-frame camera, the dramatic lens distortion bends the cityscape into a dynamic, playful composition, amplifying surreal street-fashion aesthetics while maintaining grounded realism. The palette is composed of earthy grays, muted greens, layered blues, rich browns, and warm fruit tones, guided by the HEX palette (#36433a, #070c05, #25332b, #455048, #191f13, #5a5f56, #74746c, #958c84, #5d3d1e, #e6d7d3, #b0a7a1). title: Punk Editorial Portrait (Woman / White Railing)
prompt: A high-angle shot captures a young [reference image ethnicity] woman with a striking, model-like face based on the reference image, seated against a white wooden railing, gazing directly at the camera with confident, rebellious intensity. Hyper-realistic human skin texture with visible natural pores, fine micro-details, subtle imperfections, and realistic tonal variation; soft cinematic lighting interacting naturally with skin surface; authentic subsurface scattering for lifelike depth; balanced matte and natural sheen (no plastic or waxy look); ultra-photoreal finish with film-grade detail, high dynamic range, and natural skin softness preserved under cinematic color grading. Her hair is parted in the middle and styled back with sleek precision, framing her facial structure while maintaining raw editorial realism. She wears a glossy black jacket draped effortlessly over her shoulders and a crisp white shirt with a black tie, paired with fishnet stockings that add gritty texture and punk-inspired attitude. Red-orange tinted sunglasses are partially lowered on her nose, creating a confrontational, fashion-forward gaze. The weathered wooden porch floor beneath her adds tactile contrast, with visible grain, scratches, and worn texture enhancing the candid atmosphere. Harsh direct flash lighting creates bright highlights and deep, sculptural shadows, dramatically accentuating skin texture, fabric shine, fishnet detail, and the glossy finish of her jacket while preserving realistic tonal depth. The visual palette is dominated by monochrome blacks, whites, weathered greys, and muted neutrals, punctuated by the vivid red-orange of the sunglasses for bold visual tension. Captured with a full-frame digital camera emulating high-contrast candid film photography, likely with a wide prime lens and aggressive flash, the composition evokes edgy punk style, rebellious youth culture, and underground fashion editorial energy. Ultra-detailed textures, cinematic contrast, premium fashion-campaign realism, and the HEX palette (#121212, #555757, #444645, #373735, #a6a9aa, #666b6d, #eaeaea, #252423, #b8bbbc, #929596, #7c8182, #d0d2d5, #eccebe) define the final aesthetic.

title: Golden Collage Portrait (Man / Scrapbook Style)
prompt:
Ultra-realistic 9:16 ratio cinematic collage of a young man using the uploaded face exactly. The image is composed of multiple rectangular photo panels layered vertically and diagonally, creating a scrapbook-style layout. Each panel shows close-up and mid-shot portraits of the same boy in a dim indoor room. Lighting: strong, warm, golden-orange direct flash lighting hitting the face from the front-left, creating high contrast, deep shadows, and a glowing skin effect. Background remains dark with visible window curtains slightly illuminated. Harsh highlights on jawline, cheekbones, nose, and lips. Slight film grain and soft blur for a dreamy vintage feel. Color grading: intense amber, burnt orange, and golden tones dominating the entire image. High saturation, slightly crushed blacks, and glowing highlights.

Subject styling: messy textured hair with a few loose strands falling on forehead, clean masculine features, natural lips, subtle skin shine, sharp brows, fresh realistic skin texture. Wearing a silver chain necklace with minimal pendants and a casual open-collar white shirt or oversized white tee.

Composition details:
- Top panel: serious expression, looking directly at camera.
- Middle panel: cropped jawline, lips, and necklace close-up.
- Bottom left: extreme close-up of eyes with strong shadow split across face.
- Bottom right: angled portrait with soft side gaze.
- Panels overlap slightly with uneven spacing for aesthetic collage look.

Overlay elements: Add realistic flower stickers (lilies in orange, cream, and deep red tones) placed around the collage. Add a music player UI card in the center-left area with a soft rounded design.

Music player text:
- Title: "Song Name"
- Artist: "Artist Name"
- Include minimal playback bar and icons (play/pause, skip).

Final touches: Slight glow/bloom effect on highlights, subtle vignette around edges, flash photography look like taken on a digital camera at night, maintain natural skin texture, avoid over-smoothing, ultra-detailed realistic male facial features.

title: 3D Pixar-Style Avatar
prompt: Create a 3d avatar of the attached image with a happy face on a white background, no neck, digital art with pixar-quality aesthetics, aspect ratio 4:5.

title: Photorealistic CGI Caricature
prompt: Create a photorealistic CGI caricature of the person in the uploaded image, using the uploaded image as the sole and complete visual source for clothing, accessories, pose, colors, and overall appearance. Preserve the person's exact identity, facial features, age cues, skin tone, hair, beard, and likeness, while transforming them into a realistic caricature with a slightly oversized head, compact body, and subtly shortened proportions. The result must look like a real human recreated as high-end photoreal CGI, not a toy, not Pixar, not vinyl, not cartoon. Use realistic skin shading with natural pores and wrinkles, authentic hair and beard detail, and true-to-life materials and shadows. Lighting should be clean daylight or studio daylight with crisp, realistic shadows on a clean off-white background. No reinterpretation, no redesign, no added styling beyond what exists in the uploaded image. Ultra-high definition, hyper-realistic CGI quality, grounded and believable, no text, no logos, no watermarks. Aspect ratio 4:5.

title: Timeline / Age Progression Portrait (Man)
prompt:
Hyper-realistic portrait in a "timeline" composition showing the evolution of a man (@img1) across life stages, aligned left to right:

child (around 5 years old), pre-teen, young adult, adult, and older man. All represent the same person at different ages. The face must be identical to the photo submitted at 103%, with Absolute Facial Identity Lock (same bone structure, proportions, skin texture, expression and features — no stylization, no artificial smoothing, no identity alteration).

Environment with a minimalist dark background in a soft gradient, cinematic lateral and top lighting creating depth and volumetric cutout. Each stage with clothing coherent with the age (casual children's wear up to sophisticated adult), maintaining visual harmony and natural transition between ages.

Slightly angular perspective with soft depth of field, keeping all characters in progressive focus.

Clean editorial composition, premium advertising aesthetic, sense of progress and passage of time. Add a subtle graphic element (arrow/curve) indicating temporal continuity from left to right.

High-fidelity textures, skin with real micro-details, global illumination, subtle reflections and natural shadows. Extreme Quality — Realism 333%, 8K resolution, professional sharpness, cinematic color grading.

Vertical format 3:4, centered framing, balance between characters and composition, ready for Instagram.

title: Night Escalator Street Fashion (Woman)
prompt: Do not change facial features. Use the uploaded photo as the ONLY and EXACT facial reference. Preserve facial identity with absolute priority: exact facial geometry, proportions, likeness, age, natural skin texture, hair color and style. No beautification, no stylization, no changes to the face. If any conflict occurs — preserve the face exactly. Vertical photorealistic urban fashion photo, format 2:3 (or 3:4), night flash street style look. Scene on an escalator in a dark indoor space (metro/mall): metallic ribbed steps with yellow-orange edges, dark side panels and handrails reflecting light, decorative tall plants visible behind glass/panel on the left. Escalator recedes upward into darkness, strong perspective with leading lines converging upward. In the center of the frame a young woman sits on the escalator steps in a relaxed pose: one leg bent and raised (knee up), the other leg resting on the lower step closer to the camera; one hand near her face/ear (as if fixing her hair), the other hand resting on her knee, rings visible. Head turned to the side, confident slightly thoughtful expression. Outfit: black oversized leather jacket (leather bomber/oversized leather jacket) with voluminous sleeves and glossy highlights, dark hoodie/longsleeve underneath, loose straight/baggy light blue jeans. Footwear: beige suede platform slippers/mini boots. Accessories: small black bag on the side with silver chain detail, several rings. Hairstyle: light blonde, high messy bun, two face-framing strands. Glam makeup: even base, light contouring, defined brows, expressive cat-eye liner and long lashes, nude-pink lips with satin/light gloss finish. A high-resolution, hyper-realistic skin texture with visible, clear facial expressions with no blur, natural pores, fine lines and subtle imperfections, cinematic lighting. Lighting: harsh frontal on-camera flash, model and foreground steps brightly lit, background noticeably darker, high detail on skin, leather jacket, denim and metal steps. Realistic candid flash photo look, sharp focus, 8K, photorealistic, no text, no logos, high realism.

title: Car Passenger Editorial (Woman / Template)
prompt: DO NOT CHANGE FACIAL FEATURES. A [SKIN TONE] WOMAN SITS IN THE FRONT PASSENGER SEAT OF AN ELEGANT [CAR INTERIOR COLOR/STYLE] CAR, TURNED SIDEWAYS. SHE IS WEARING [DESCRIBE OUTFIT FROM REFERENCE IMAGE]. HER [DESCRIBE MAKEUP STYLE] AND [HAIR DESCRIPTION] ARE VISIBLE FROM UNDER [DESCRIBE EYEWEAR OR ACCESSORIES]. IN HER HANDS SHE HOLDS [DESCRIBE PROP — e.g., COFFEE CUP / BOOK / BAG]. OUTSIDE THE WINDOW IS [DESCRIBE BACKGROUND SCENERY FROM REFERENCE — e.g., AUTUMN FOREST / CITY STREET / SNOWY LANDSCAPE]. title: Futuristic Streetwear Poster (Faceless Floating Model)
prompt:
A high-end streetwear fashion poster featuring a faceless futuristic model floating and jumping in the sky. The model wears an oversized beige puffer jacket, layered hoodies, and a knitted face mask completely covering the face. The lower outfit includes loose white cargo pants layered with exaggerated light blue and dark blue stacked denim leg warmers, paired with beige sneakers and a black crossbody shoulder bag.

The subject is captured from an extreme low-angle perspective, with the legs and shoes dramatically enlarged to create a powerful visual impact, as if the figure is leaping over the viewer's head. The pose feels anti-gravity and surreal — one arm stretched outward while one leg kicks forward, creating a dynamic floating motion.

The background features a bright cyan-blue sky with soft white clouds, illuminated by clean natural daylight with an airy atmosphere. The overall visual style blends high-fashion editorial photography, surreal streetwear advertising, and modern poster design.

Add two smaller collage-style silhouette versions of the character in the top-right and bottom-left corners — one floating in the air and one mid-jump — to create a fashion magazine collage aesthetic.

The poster layout is designed like a square magazine cover, featuring huge abstract rounded typography at the top inspired by Y2K bubble fonts and experimental streetwear brand logos. Add a small graffiti-style brand mark on the left side. On the right side, include a white handwritten brush-style headline reading: 'RISE ABOVE WITH FASHION', followed by tiny editorial description text underneath. Add a small barcode centered at the bottom. The entire poster should include a thin white border and subtle off-white paper texture.

Style keywords: futuristic street fashion, avant-garde clothing design, Y2K graphic design, magazine cover layout, collage silhouettes, ultra-low-angle perspective, sky background, surreal floating motion, exaggerated perspective, trendy commercial fashion campaign, realistic fabric textures, high-definition details, clean luxury aesthetic.

Aspect ratio: 3:4.
